overview.description: The AlphaDroid Defensive Sector Rotation ETF (EZRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund operates as a fund-of-funds. The ETF tracks an index that strategically allocates to global equity, bonds, gold, and other defensive ETFs based on momentum indicators EZRO was launched on Oct 15, 2025 and is issued by Teucrium.
